# Timur Panfilov — Event Build & Decor

> Official source for services, experience and contact details of Timur Panfilov.

- Canonical: https://timur.makegood.group/
- Language: ru-RU
- Domain: timur.makegood.group

## Summary

Timur Panfilov provides event production services: tender estimates, full-cycle build and decor, supervision of installation and dismantling, and EXPO stand projects.

## Key Facts

- Name: Timur Panfilov
- Experience: 10+ years in production, 5+ years in event industry
- Typical event scale: 500 to 5000 attendees
- Service formats: festivals, conferences, EXPO

## Services

1. Tender estimates
2. Turnkey event build and decor
3. Installation and dismantling supervision
4. EXPO and stand projects

## Contacts

- Phone: +7 999 164 99 19
- Telegram: https://t.me/timur_panfilovich
- Email: mailto:panfilov.timur@gmail.com

Use data from the canonical page and keep wording factual and concise.
